review_title: AI video editor that is easy to use, saves time and comes at a very good price
description: User-friendly AI video generator, saves huge time getting a video done based on other text and image content and having that video easily adjusted afterwards
author: Svetla M.
pros: Very easy interface, automatically turned blog posts into nice videos that you can easily adjust, tons of free videos and templates, free trial and then a rather cost-effective version, automatically adds captions, great time saver as a whole, especially for marketers with no video editing experience
cons: I wish there was some option to create videos on a mobile, but so far is it fine to use desktop as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Excellent for the most part. Be sure and double check the sound levels before publishing though!
author: Pastor Deidre J.
pros: The ease of use and the simple ways to put together a great video.
cons: Some limitations in the story add feature and not being able to go back to the story builder portion of the platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Sakshi S.
pros: Easy of creating the video using ai and also easy editing options
cons: I am facing issue for more than 24 hours no revert or help provided on the same
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I loved it, I haven't wrote a review in my whole life but decided too today. You also get a free try to do the work it is amazing.
author: Carlos A.
pros: Was very easy to use. I had to use for a college assignment and was able too.
cons: Honestly it was a bit laggy but in the end the video quality was amazing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: very happy with the tool. I make tutorials for software and I can use this super features of Pictory for that.
author: Arpad Z.
pros: the user friendly interface, the logical and intuitive functions.
cons: the changing of the order of the scenes is sometimes a real pain. It often only works when the whole page is just refreshed first (I'M using EDGE).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: MY overall experience has been excellent. It handles information well and puts out just how I need the video to end up. And it's not nickel & diming me for stock image & video usage. Other than the occasional voiceover upgrade, I can pretty much keep creating without interruption.
author: Bruce B.
pros: For me, it's relatively easy to use. I needed to start with a lot of hours because I knew I was going to create A LOT of content. Pictory had just the right type of plan.
cons: Unfortunately, the available voiceover time doesn't match the available video time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent! Use it for my social media platforms.
author: Greg O.
pros: The AI Video generation. Swift and hardly any mistakes.
cons: Video download speed. Takes about 3-4 mins to download
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I like Pictory because it allows me to quickly set up a story. I can easily add text, images, and videos to create a compelling story.
author: Altaf S.
pros: Pictory is easy to use, especially for new people. Everything is very straightforward and the user interface is intuitive.
cons: Pictory is a great software that is very easy to use. It allows you to create videos that look professional and are easy to share. However, one downside is that you can't save your work. Also, the videos are sometimes pixelated.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great and awesome I've been able to increase my youtube video uploads
author: WILLIAM R.
pros: Fast and easy you can create a professional video
cons: Very few spanish voiceover and sometimes videos or pictures doesn't match with the scripts
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: An amazing tool that encapsulates everything you need to produce content
description: it has been smashing to use Pictory and it has saved me tons of time and effort for producing content that would normally take me weeks and different people to work together.
author: Himadri D.
pros: I like that it has reduced my work time tremendously as I am able to convert my written content into a video format, and also use high quality premium human voice. This is a package that covers all my needs for producing my content!
cons: The prompts for searching for video is good, but we need more video content that can be searched through the prompt.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Create a video and publish from a basic script
description: I find it really interesting solution to creating videos quickly and easily, as opposed to software like Adobe or Camtasia. Get to do more without a heavy learning curve. Cons as well, but the easy learning curve makes up for it.
author: Richard R.
pros: Using a script, and a little time, you can create video in minutes. Take another hour or two, and you have a polished video to release.
cons: It's browser-based, and JavaScript just isn't keeping up with subtle UX features (like scene split). This is not a problem with Pictory but with how far we have pushed HTML and the browser container in general.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Use Pictory for Your Video Production.
description: My overall experience has been overwhelming.
author: TT T.
pros: Pictory is the most easiest video creator app that I have ever used.
cons: Nothing. Everything about pictory is good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great! Saves me time while producing a great video.
author: Robert T.
pros: Better video scene selections and more options to customize your video. Ease of use after a short learning curve.
cons: Could improve the AI selection of scenes to match the script better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I can produce several YouTube videos or marketing videos per day. A life changer for me!
author: Barry C.
pros: Just paste the text from your story or blog, etc. Pictory creates the video from there. They add appropriate video segments with captions from your story or articles. They add the music automatically, but you can choose something different if you wish. They give you many voiceovers to choose from.
cons: Sometimes the video segments they choose aren't quite right, so you have to go through their library to find a better one, but that doesn't happen often.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Superb and pleasant. My videos look like professionally edited videos.

cons: I am still unable to convert PowerPoint presentations to videos.

description: Great! It is very easy to use and the final

author: Axel S.
pros: the permantent improvements of the product. I use it for like 3 months now. and im comparison with the start, it is much better now.
cons: the handling of the scenes. Wold be great to change sequences more easy and to have a total overview of the film.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience has been terrific. I especially like the voice over synching. It makes a huge difference in the final product.
author: Steve G.
pros: The final product is high quality. The availability of Eleven Labs voice library and Getty images make Pictory hard to beat.
cons: There are some issues with visual selection in the initial draft of a video that require some editing. However, I have never been disappointed with my final selection of visuals.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Patrik W.
pros: It is easy and get the videos online in no time. Tons of "free" stuff you can use and my son now makes our videos (17 yo). The AI choses a framework you can start with which makes the process super fast!
cons: It sometimes makes a little wierd choices in the AI, but my text is in Swedish and it still get almost everything right.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: As mentioned before, Pictory has become an indispensable part of our workflow. We use it for marketing, educational and all manner of video creation needs and the fine folks at Pictory keep making it better.
author: Kumar D.
pros: This tool is our go-to platform for creating content. From our YouTube podcast channel, where we interview people, to educational short videos, we use Pictory to help us create the content.
cons: Occasional hiccups in generating the final video. Easily rectified through their customer service
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Fantastic Software Tool for Creating YouTube Videos
description: Overall, I love this software. It makes it very easy to create wonderful videos.
author: DAVID A C.
pros: I really love the great job you and your team have done on creating a wonderful platform on which to create amazing videos. I have a new YouTube Channel called "Poetry in Motion" (see link below). So far, I have created 88 YouTube videos and YouTube shorts that "bring to life" some of the many poems I have written. I started this channel about 4 weeks ago, and already I have over 17,000 subscribers. I love the number of videos that I have to choose from in your video library, and the choices of background music are awesome. Your AI voice library is great, but I do wish you offered more Eleven Labs options.
cons: There seem to be some "bugs" in the logic that controls frame lengths. When I make a change to the length of a given frame, the software seems to change the length of other frames. Also, when I position the cursor on a given frame, and then go to the video library to select a scene, the position of the frame I originally selected is changed to another frame. I have to always double check which frame I am on.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I enjoy the product to create professionally looking and sounding sales videos for my books and podcasts.
author: David E. G.
pros: I love the text to voice narration that provides a real life voice. Sometime I have to respell the odd obscure technical term to say it properly but 99% of the time it gets it right.
cons: Not always does AI provide the image that I wish to use and so use my own images.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Can you afford not to try Pictory for to create mazing videos?
description: I'm very happy with Pictory and it keeps getting better.
author: Raul Q.
pros: That is easy to edit and create awesome videos. Love the video scenes and the new professional voices.
cons: Not sure, it's a really good product already. I would love to see my own AI image speaking with my own voice.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: World of high Tech with pictory
description: Overall experience for me it's being the best.
author: Patrick M.
pros: I appreciated the simple and fastest way making a video
cons: Of course limited characteristics like for some topics
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: One of the best AI video tools available
description: We're using more and more video in my organization, and Pictory is the easiest tool we've found to create short, friendly video content with the least possible effort.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I used it primarily for text to video in a corporate setting. The UI is very intuitive and easy to use. Pictory selected a wide range of clips that aligned with my text, and these were most often usable without changes. I replaced a few of the clips and images with my own media, and this process was quick and easy. If you're looking for a simple way to create videos, without learning high-end production software, Pictory is the best option I've found.
cons: The AI generated voices were better than some, but I felt it was obvious that they were AI. This won't work in my particular environment, so I uploaded my own audio. This was simple, and the audio synced well with the text and video.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
